skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A distance of 285 furlongs is equivalent to how many feet? (1 furlong = 220 yards and 1 yard = 3 feet)
rationale: Choice A is correct. Each furlong equals 220 yards, and each yard equals 3 feet, so 1 furlong = 220 × 3 = 660 feet. Therefore 285 furlongs = 285 × 660 = 188,100 feet. Choice B is incorrect because 62,700 = 285 × 220 converts to yards, not feet. Choice C is incorrect because 20,900 results from multiplying 95 × 220, not the given values. Choice D is incorrect because 855 = 285 × 3 ignores the yards-to-furlongs conversion.
